name: Ogdoadic Hollow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>溟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>虚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うつろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During the Main Phase: You can Tribute 1 Reptile Effect Monster, then target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it to your field, but send it to the GY during the End Phase. You can only use this effect of "Ogdoadic Hollow" once per turn. If this face-up card is sent from the Spell & Trap Zone to the GY: Send all face-up non-Reptile monsters you control to the GY.
eff: During the Main Phase: You can Tribute 1 Reptile Effect Monster, then target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it to your field, but send it to the GY during the End Phase. You can only use this effect of "Ogdoadic Hollow" once per turn. If this face-up card is sent from the Spell & Trap Zone to the GY: Send all face-up non-Reptile monsters you control to the GY.

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
